infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Amici checks your location in the background about once a minute, but only during the active windows you set, to notify you when someone nearby shares an interest or hometown. It never tracks you outside those windows.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Amici uses your location to find people nearby who share an interest or hometown with you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Amici checks your location in the background about once a minute, but only during the active windows you set, to notify you when someone nearby shares an interest or hometown. It never tracks you outside those windows.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Amici checks your location in the background about once a minute, but only during the active windows you set, to notify you when someone nearby shares an interest or hometown. It never tracks you outside those windows.
